label: BARBEARIA

Highly detailed vertical luxury barber editorial poster, premium street-fashion magazine aesthetic, cinematic urban barbershop photography.

Dominant barber sitting confidently on a premium vintage barber chair. Low-angle perspective creating authority and iconic presence. One arm resting casually while holding professional hair clippers. Relaxed yet powerful posture. Wearing modern luxury streetwear consisting of oversized jacket, fitted t-shirt, chains, rings and premium sneakers.

Typography layout:
Massive distressed uppercase typography dominating the upper section.

"{{HEADLINE_2}}"
"{{HEADLINE_3}}"

• {{SVC_2}}

Lighting:
Cinematic dramatic lighting with deep shadows and premium editorial contrast.

Color palette:
Black, gold, white, warm brown accents.

Style:
GQ magazine meets luxury barber campaign meets urban street editorial.
